title: That's Not Fair
lyrics:
[opening]
Mama, mama, mama, mama!
What?
Papa, papa, papa, papa!
What NOW?
Mama, papa, mama, papa!
WHAT?!
That's not fair!

[verse]
You got the last cookie right there!
My ice cream fell and that's not fair!
I sat on the floor, there's no chair!
You gave him the big one, I swear! *what?*

[chorus]
That's not fair! That's not fair!
I didn't get any, you don't care!
That's not fair! That's not fair!
I want the sparkly one right there!

[verse]
My brother got more, he's a bear!
I tripped on the rug, now I tear! *gasp*
You never let me go nowhere!
I didn't mean to, I swear!

[chorus]
That's not fair! That's not fair!
I didn't get any, you don't care!
That's not fair! That's not fair!
I want the sparkly one right there!

[verse]
I wanted the green one, not that pear! *burp*
He got the whole thing, no share!
I only got one and it's rare!
You won't let me do the dare! *hmm?*

[chorus]
That's not fair... *snore*
That's not fair... *zzz*
I didn't get any...
...maybe tomorrow's... okay?
style_prompt: Catchy bouncy children's song, guitar, snappy drums, groovy bass, 118 BPM, school bus singalong energy, punchy beat clapping on 2 and 4, fun physical comedic vocal, call and response
cover_description: A child standing on a couch like a courtroom lawyer, pointing dramatically at an imaginary jury, a dog sitting as the judge wearing a tiny wig, living room turned into a courtroom
rhyme_family: air, bear, care, chair, dare, flare, hair, lair, pair, pear, rare, share, snare, stair, stare, swear, tear, there, where, wear
